summary.claim_boundary: Visualization, GBIF context and AI exports preserve graph claim states and cannot upgrade evidence.

source_registry.principle: Every automated source is a licensed, snapshot-based, provenance-captured input. Live retrieval never becomes evidence until it is hashed, normalized, audited and assigned a claim state.

sources.name: GBIF Occurrence API and Download API
sources.license_policy: record GBIF dataset license and citation; preserve download DOI when available; do not scrape gbif.org pages
sources.rate_limit_policy: set User-Agent; use download API for large jobs; cache snapshots; exponential backoff on 429
sources.evidence_role: occurrence/sample/geography/context; not molecular proof by itself

sources.name: GBIF DNA-derived data extension tables
sources.license_policy: inherit dataset license; preserve EML, meta.xml and extension row links
sources.rate_limit_policy: download archives once per snapshot; no repeated live polling
sources.evidence_role: sequence/method/marker context; required for DNA-based reproducibility

sources.name: NCBI Entrez E-utilities / nucleotide and protein metadata
sources.license_policy: record database terms and accession provenance; do not redistribute restricted payloads without checking terms
sources.rate_limit_policy: respect NCBI usage guidelines; API key optional; cache accessions and version numbers
sources.evidence_role: reference sequence and provenance; supports reference completeness and accession crosswalks

sources.name: InterProScan / InterPro domain-family-site annotations
sources.license_policy: record InterProScan and member database versions; note tools with special licenses
sources.rate_limit_policy: prefer local batch; REST only for small jobs; cache results
sources.evidence_role: protein/domain/function annotation overlay; not taxonomic proof

sources.name: Gene Ontology terms and evidence codes
sources.license_policy: record GO release, license and version; preserve GO IDs and evidence codes
sources.evidence_role: controlled vocabulary for function/process/component; evidence coding

sources.name: PubMed/Crossref/OpenAlex-style literature metadata
sources.license_policy: store metadata and claim summaries; do not redistribute full text unless licensed
sources.rate_limit_policy: cache DOI/PMID records; respect API policies
sources.evidence_role: publication support and contradiction tracking; articles are evidence objects, not truth

sources.name: User-provided FASTA/CSV/reference packs
sources.license_policy: user must mark shareability; private uploads never enter public atlas without explicit release
sources.evidence_role: overlay input checked against the atlas and reference context

global_guardrails: No live response is treated as verified evidence until snapshot_hash and provenance_hash are computed.
No visualization can upgrade a claim state.
No AI output can overwrite a verified graph fact.
Large GBIF queries use download jobs rather than aggressive paged API loops.
Every export preserves claim_state, caveats and ruleset_hash.

ui_contract.design_principle: The UI is an explanation system over a verified evidence graph, not a decorative dashboard.

screens.title: Evidence Observatory Home
screens.purpose: Show processed-data inventory, run health, source freshness and current graph version.

screens.title: Source Intake Radar
screens.purpose: Visualize automated data collection and show why a source is accepted, delayed, cached or blocked.

screens.title: Verified Segment Evidence Array Grid
screens.purpose: Browse segment x taxon x reference x evidence records with claim states.

screens.title: Evidence Graph Explorer
screens.purpose: Explore nodes and edges: segments, taxa, references, publications, annotations, blockers and exports.

screens.title: Tree-of-Life Segment Map
screens.purpose: Show where a segment/cluster occurs across species, genera, families and clades.

screens.title: Trait and Function Evidence Panel
screens.purpose: Attach annotations and literature to segments while preserving evidence type and contradiction state.

screens.title: Repair Optimizer
screens.purpose: Rank missing metadata, reference gaps, source conflicts and publication blockers by unlock value.

screens.title: GBIF Export Workbench
screens.purpose: Prepare Occurrence core and DNA-derived extension files from verified, bounded evidence only.

screens.title: AI-Ready Dataset Builder
screens.purpose: Export matrices and graph features while separating verified labels, weak hypotheses and blocked claims.

screens.title: Judge Mode
screens.purpose: One-click competition path: run demo, inspect graph, view proof checklist and export evidence pack.

snapshot_manifest.claim_boundary: Occurrence records are context and provenance only; they do not strengthen molecular taxon support.
snapshot_manifest.license_policy: Preserve GBIF dataset license and citation per source registry.

sources.claim_boundary: Molecular barcode/GSEG gates define taxon support.

vsea.claim_boundary: Species-level molecular assignment candidate for Aedes albopictus within the supplied reference context.
vsea.caveats: absolute species truth outside the stated reference context; natural presence, absence, abundance or distribution without occurrence evidence; phenotype, pathogenicity, ecological role or invasiveness; replacement for GBIF Sequence ID, curated reference databases or expert review
vsea.context_claim_boundary: GBIF context is linked after hashing; it does not promote claim_state.

vsea.claim_boundary: Genus-level molecular evidence for Aedes; species-level naming is blocked for this sequence.
vsea.caveats: absolute species truth outside the stated reference context; natural presence, absence, abundance or distribution without occurrence evidence; phenotype, pathogenicity, ecological role or invasiveness; replacement for GBIF Sequence ID, curated reference databases or expert review
vsea.blockers: species claim blocked: statistically indistinguishable competitors collapse the safe rank to genus
vsea.context_claim_boundary: GBIF context is linked after hashing; it does not promote claim_state.

vsea.claim_boundary: Review-only molecular hint; identity, coverage or marker profile is too weak for a safe taxonomic claim.
vsea.caveats: absolute species truth outside the stated reference context; natural presence, absence, abundance or distribution without occurrence evidence; phenotype, pathogenicity, ecological role or invasiveness; replacement for GBIF Sequence ID, curated reference databases or expert review
vsea.blockers: species claim blocked: top hit does not pass coi_full_barcode exact gate identity >= 99% and query coverage >= 80%; species claim blocked: query coverage < 80%
vsea.context_claim_boundary: GBIF context is linked after hashing; it does not promote claim_state.

vsea.claim_boundary: Review-only candidate at species rank: Aedes albopictus.
vsea.caveats: absolute species truth outside the stated reference context; natural presence, absence, abundance or distribution without occurrence evidence; phenotype, pathogenicity, ecological role or invasiveness; replacement for GBIF Sequence ID, curated reference databases or expert review
vsea.blockers: publication blocked: missing required Occurrence core field occurrenceID; publication blocked: missing required Occurrence core field eventDate
vsea.context_claim_boundary: GBIF context is linked after hashing; it does not promote claim_state.

barcode_summary.title: Barcode-to-GBIF Evidence Compiler
barcode_summary.project_title: Aedes COI batch: safe, ambiguous, weak and metadata cases
barcode_summary.reference_database: COI Animals / BOLD public clustered reference
barcode_summary.method_or_sop: GBIF Sequence ID-compatible BLAST workflow with deterministic rank gates
barcode_summary.verdict: At least one sequence is species-safe under the frozen molecular evidence gates; publication readiness is reported separately.
